title: Advancement Race
description:
You thought you knew Minecraft? Prove it. Race every advancements in the game and get more points.
it's a mod made in MCreator for racing advancements against your firends or yourself optimizing your gameplay and getting more points.
body:
![Advancement-Race banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2987bffbb54ec4cce2c9358dff98adfce6834cb7.png)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[![curseforge_button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9d2b051ede5f22e74030c06ccf8c16db2d57b49.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/nolini135/projects)

[![modrinth_button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39391520edba2a31229b635416e28760cc6e6079.png)](https://modrinth.com/user/nolini135)

[![pmc_button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25ec8938dc84b233e222565e65c9fa620f2acded.png)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/nolini135/)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

thank you for looking at my mod!
it was made in MCreator so it is not perfect but i took a lot of time making it so i hope you'r liking it!

Have you never wanted to **race advancements against your friends**? because i do!
if there is bugs, please report it [here](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScFWHsyPrD_xNDKat856gRShBj34m6mSlpCMjb5y1e_0QBP4g/viewform?usp=sharing&ouid=115616087951920451236) or on my [Discord Server (french)](https://discord.gg/37q3gSekxS) so i can fix it in the next version.
here is how it works:
- you have a **limited time** to complete advancements
- completing an advancement grant you points: advancement: **50**p, goal: **150**p, challenges: **300**p

commands:
- _/acrace_: used to open the AC-PHONE menu

- _/start_: used to start a game

- _/reset_: used to reset all variables used

- _/end_race_: used to end the race

sorry for my awfull english and have fun!
